function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0004
alias: northstar_design_partner_sprint
issued_on: 2026-02-14
total_eur: 890
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 650
    line_eur: 650
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar design-partner workflow sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0004                        |
| alias          | northstar_design_partner_sprint |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-14                      |
| total_eur      | 890                             |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH   |
| project        | Northstar Ledger                |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 650      | 650      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 890      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the half-product, half-services invoices that keeps testing the boundary between startup work and bespoke delivery.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md` using only visible note data, preserved the existing note body beneath the frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read system and lane AGENTS/workflows/schemas before mutation, preserved original file body verbatim under frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted processed inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance.
function.outcome_justification: The target invoice note contained all required invoice schema fields and line-item values, enabling exact extraction into frontmatter without guessing; write succeeded, and inbox-processing-v2 requires removing the inbox request after successful completion.
